name: Bash History Credential Access - Shell History File Reading
description: Detects reading of shell history files for credential harvesting. Monitors for cat/grep/less on .bash_history, .zsh_history, .mysql_history and password-related history searches.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name : ("cat", "less", "more", "grep", "head", "strings") and process.args : ("*.bash_history*", "*.zsh_history*", "*.mysql_history*", "*.psql_history*", "*.sh_history*")) or (process.args : "*history*" and process.args : "*password*"))
